name: SCAR-20 | 大宪章
descriptionEn: The SCAR-20 is a semi-automatic sniper rifle that trades a high rate of fire and powerful long-distance damage for sluggish movement speed and big price tag. A purple-colored pattern of crests, scrawls, and text from the Magna Carta has been applied. Everyone is subject to due process—even you
descriptionZh: SCAR-20 是一把以迟缓的移动速度和高昂的价格为代价，换取高射速及强大的远距离杀伤力的半自动狙击步枪。 这把武器的灵感来源于大宪章中的纹章、字迹与文字，用紫色演绎出设计的亮点。 法律不能使人人平等，但是在法律面前人人是平等的
